## Problem / motivation

What problem are you trying to solve? What's the use case? Is your request
related to a frustration with the current behaviour?

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Scope notes

<!-- Optional: which part of the plugin would this touch? -->

- [ ] Panel UI (config mode / view mode)
- [ ] Backend proxy
- [ ] Security / allowlist behaviour
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other:

## Additional context

Add any other context, mockups, or screenshots about the feature request here.
